# Graveyard (refuted and superseded)

Do NOT re-propose or re-test anything here unless its **re-open gate** condition has
measurably changed. This list exists specifically to stop rehashing discredited ideas.

| H016 | refuted | Deferring the end-turn option (type 14) beats first_agent (take the first maxCount) in the real cabt engine | win rate 0.515 (103/200) vs first_agent, within the n=200 noise band; the type-14 deferral adds no measurable edge over taking the first options | only revisit with a board-aware evaluation (reading current.players HP/prizes/energy), not a raw option-type priority |  | 2026-06-16 |
